title: Seto no Hanayome
description:
Seto no Hanayome is a romantic comedy anime that follows the chaotic and hilarious life of Nagasumi Michishio, an ordinary middle school boy whose life changes forever after a near-death accident during his summer vacation. While visiting the seaside, Nagasumi accidentally begins drowning in the ocean and is rescued by a beautiful mermaid girl named Sun Seto. 

However, Nagasumi soon learns about a strict mermaid law stating that if a human discovers a mermaid’s true identity, either the human or the mermaid must die to protect the secret of mermaid society. To avoid this tragic outcome, Sun’s yakuza-style mermaid family decides that the only solution is for Nagasumi and Sun to become engaged and eventually marry. 

Thrown into an absurd and dangerous new life, Nagasumi must suddenly adapt to living alongside mermaids, eccentric gangsters, and countless bizarre situations while trying to survive the terrifying overprotectiveness of Sun’s father, the powerful mermaid yakuza boss Gozaburo Seto. At the same time, Nagasumi and Sun slowly begin developing genuine feelings for each other despite the chaos constantly surrounding them. 

As the story progresses, more strange characters enter their lives, including rival mermaids, overdramatic classmates, obsessive admirers, and eccentric friends who create nonstop comedic misunderstandings and outrageous situations. Every episode escalates the humor through exaggerated reactions, absurd action scenes, and unpredictable comedy while still maintaining heartfelt emotional moments between the characters. 

The anime combines romance, comedy, slice-of-life storytelling, school life, and supernatural elements while parodying yakuza films, romantic comedies, and classic anime tropes in a highly energetic and entertaining way. Beneath its chaotic humor, the series also explores themes of family, loyalty, acceptance, friendship, and learning how to protect the people you care about. 

Seto no Hanayome became highly loved for its nonstop comedy, memorable cast of eccentric characters, emotional romantic moments, and over-the-top parody humor. Fans especially praised the anime for its perfect comedic timing, lovable characters, and its ability to balance ridiculous chaos with surprisingly heartfelt storytelling.
